entities.name: PIGEON PEA
entities.description: A legume crop, Cajanus cajan, evaluated for pod damage in Sri Lanka

entities.name: MARUCA TESTULALIS
entities.description: A pest insect that causes pod damage and flower drop in pigeon pea

entities.name: DETERMINATE LINES
entities.description: Pigeon pea genotypes with a determinate growth habit and clustered inflorescences

entities.name: INDETERMINATE LINES
entities.description: Pigeon pea genotypes with an indeterminate growth habit, long fruiting branches, and loose inflorescences

entities.name: POD DAMAGE
entities.description: The percentage of pods damaged by M. testulalis

entities.name: DAYS TO 50% FLOWERING
entities.description: The duration until 50% of the plants reach the flowering stage

entities.name: RECOVERY FROM POD DAMAGE
entities.description: The capacity of the plant to recover after suffering pod damage

entities.name: FLOWER DROP
entities.description: The shedding of flowers resulting from M. testulalis damage

entities.name: CLUSTERED INFLORESCENCES
entities.description: A morphological characteristic of determinate lines that increases susceptibility to pests

entities.name: LONG FRUITING BRANCHES
entities.description: A morphological characteristic of indeterminate lines

entities.name: LOOSE INFLORESCENCES
entities.description: A morphological characteristic of indeterminate lines

entities.name: SRI LANKA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: FIELD CROPS RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTE
entities.description: The research facility in Maha Illuppallama, Sri Lanka where the evaluation took place

relationships.source: FIELD CROPS RESEARCH AND DEVELOPMENT INSTITUTE
